seo.title: Partnership – Your Own Car
seo.description: Work as a partner using your own car with Bolt and Uber. Check the cooperation terms.

intro.description: Partner with us and work using your own vehicle with Bolt or Uber.

commissionTable.title: Commission Table
commissionTable.subtitle: Monthly turnover
commissionTable.note: Commission is calculated based on weekly revenue

items.title: Costs and payments
content: Settlement commission – even 0 PLN (depending on revenue)
Mandate contract tax – 50 PLN per week (for students under 26 – 0 PLN)
No additional fees for app settlements

items.title: 50% VAT refund on fuel
content: We refund 50% of the VAT included in fuel expenses
Settlement is processed automatically – no additional formalities

items.title: Work with Bolt / Uber
items.intro: We provide full formal support when starting cooperation.

items.title: Required documents
content: TAXI annotation in the registration certificate – our team will guide you through the process
Taxi liability insurance (OC TAXI) – we cooperate with experienced agents to secure the best offer
Criminal record certificate (not older than 30 days)

contact.title: Apply for partnership
contact.description: Fill in the form and we will contact you about starting cooperation with your own car.
